segment.source: A compact highlighted notice card with an alert icon, heading, short plain-text description, a click-to-call phone number, and an availability line with clock icon. Use it for: emergency hotlines, on-call and after-hours numbers, urgent service, breakdown, or crisis contacts, '24/7 support' passages. Prefer 'Contact Info' for regular contact details; use 'Inline Alert Notice' for warnings without a phone number.
